title: prefab
text: R package providing opinionated project scaffolding via composable theme system. major use case standardizing project setup conventions data analysis Economic Policy Institute (EPI), configurations useful data analysis project.

title: prefab
text: Development (0.0.0.9000). Core theme system fully implemented. exported functions working 232 passing tests clean R CMD check.

title: prefab
text: Theme: ordered list steps, composed via + step_file(source, dest, strategy = "overwrite", data = NULL): deploy file merge strategy step_text(content, dest, strategy = "overwrite"): deploy inline text content merge strategy step_run(fn, ..., .label = NULL): execute R function Source helpers: from_package(package) from_dir(path) return step-builders Merge strategies: "overwrite", "skip", "union", "append", "merge_json" Template rendering: data = list(...) enables {{var}} interpolation via glue

title: prefab
text: step_file(source, dest, strategy = "overwrite", data = NULL) — create file deployment step step_text(content, dest, strategy = "overwrite") — create inline text deployment step step_run(fn, ..., .label = NULL) — create function execution step from_package(package) — return step-builder function(source, dest, strategy = "overwrite", data = NULL) resolves source paths package (installed loaded via devtools::load_all()) from_dir(path) — return step-builder function(source, dest, strategy = "overwrite", data = NULL) resolves source paths local directory new_theme(...) — construct theme step objects use_theme(theme) — apply theme current project create_project(path, theme) — create directory apply theme theme_code(theme) — print R code reproduces theme (copy-paste customization)

title: prefab
text: r_analysis(), r_targets() — project structure scaffolding claude_r_analysis(), claude_r_targets() — Claude Code agent config

title: prefab
code: R/   prefab-package.R        # Package-level docs   step.R                  # step_file(), step_text(), step_run()   source-helpers.R        # from_package(), from_dir()   theme.R                 # new_theme(), +.prefab_theme, print.prefab_theme, theme_code()   strategy.R              # apply_strategy(), deploy_file(), deploy_text()   merge-json.R            # merge_json_tree()   render.R                # render_template(), build_auto_context()   execute.R               # execute_theme()   use-theme.R             # use_theme()   create-project.R        # create_project()   themes-project.R        # r_analysis(), r_targets(), gitignore_lines   themes-claude.R         # claude_r_analysis(), claude_r_targets() inst/   claude/                 # Agent config files deployed by Claude themes     settings.json         # Claude Code permission settings     rules/                # Agent convention files (one per project type)       r_analysis.md       # Conventions for analysis projects       r_package.md        # Conventions for package development (deferred theme)       r_targets.md        # Conventions for targets workflows     skills/               # Claude Code skills (deferred themes)   r_analysis/             # Template files deployed by r_analysis()   r_targets/              # Template files deployed by r_targets() plans/                    # Design and implementation plans tests/testthat/           # Tests (232 tests across 11 test files)

title: prefab
text: implementation plans go ./plans/YYYY-MM-DD--brief-description.md. CLAUDE.md must updated change code. Follow R coding conventions inst/claude/rules/r_package.md developing package.

title: Building custom themes with prefab
text: prefab theme function returns prefab_theme object – ordered list steps. Calling theme shows outline steps; nothing happens file system pass theme use_theme() create_project(). themes functions, can take parameters, compose +, ship packages.
code: library(prefab)  # Calling r_analysis() returns a theme object -- it does not write any files r_analysis() #> <theme> 3 steps #> * file → main.R (skip) #> * file → README.md (skip) #> * text → .gitignore (union) #> ℹ Apply with `use_theme()` or `create_project()`

title: Building custom themes with prefab
text: Pass theme use_theme() (existing project) create_project() (new directory): use_theme() discovers project root automatically (via ., .Rproj, .git, etc.). create_project() creates directory first, applies theme.

title: Building custom themes with prefab
text: Themes compose +, concatenating step lists: Order matters: later steps can override earlier ones merge strategy allows (e.g., two themes deploying file "overwrite").
code: # Project structure + Claude Code agent config use_theme(r_analysis() + claude_r_analysis())  create_project("~/projects/new-analysis", r_targets() + claude_r_targets())

title: Building custom themes with prefab
text: theme function R function returns prefab_theme via new_theme(). three step types : step_file(source, dest) – deploy file step_text(content, dest) – deploy inline text step_run(fn, ...) – execute function side effects themes just functions, parameters give conditional behavior free. NULL arguments new_theme() silently dropped, (cond) step(...) works naturally.
code: my_analysis <- function(use_data_dir = TRUE, extra_ignores = character(0)) {   from_templates <- from_dir("~/my-templates")   ignore_lines <- c(".Rproj.user", ".Rhistory", ".RData", extra_ignores)   new_theme(     from_templates("main.R", "main.R", strategy = "skip"),     from_templates("README.md", "README.md", strategy = "skip"),     step_text(ignore_lines, ".gitignore", strategy = "union"),     if (use_data_dir) step_run(fs::dir_create, "data", .label = "fs::dir_create")   ) }  use_theme(my_analysis(extra_ignores = "*.csv") + claude_r_analysis())

title: Building custom themes with prefab
text: from_dir() from_package() create step-builders resolve source paths relative directory installed R package: from_dir() resolves path absolute creation time, later working directory changes affect . from_package() works installed packages devtools::load_all().
code: # Resolve from a local directory from_templates <- from_dir("~/my-templates") from_templates("header.md", "README.md", strategy = "skip")  # Resolve from an installed package's inst/ directory from_prefab <- from_package("prefab") from_prefab("r_analysis/main.R", "main.R", strategy = "skip")

title: Building custom themes with prefab
text: Put template files package’s inst/ directory use from_package(): Users compose themes others:
code: # In mythemes/R/themes.R #' @export my_org_analysis <- function() {   f <- from_package("mythemes")   new_theme(     f("templates/main.R", "main.R", strategy = "skip"),     f("templates/README.md", "README.md", strategy = "skip", data = list()),     f("claude/settings.json", ".claude/settings.json", strategy = "merge_json"),     f("claude/rules/conventions.md", ".claude/rules/conventions.md")   ) } use_theme(mythemes::my_org_analysis() + prefab::claude_r_analysis())

title: Building custom themes with prefab
text: theme_code() prints R code reproduces theme – useful understanding built-themes starting point customization: Copy output, edit theme function, swap add steps. code also returned invisibly string.

title: Building custom themes with prefab
text: Every file step declares strategy handling pre-existing destination files. Strategies make use_theme() safe re-run. Guidelines choosing: Files user never edit: "overwrite". Files user customize first deploy: "skip". Line-based config entries accumulate: "union". Structured JSON config: "merge_json" (objects merge key--key, arrays union-merged, scalar collisions preserve destination value). Avoid "append" unless want duplicate content re-runs.

title: Building custom themes with prefab
text: File steps support {{var}} interpolation data non-NULL: Auto-discovered variables (built per use_theme() call): template file like: rendered merging explicit data top auto-context. Explicit values win collision. variable referenced available, rendering fails informative error. step_text() support data – inline content can interpolate R variables directly.
code: from_templates <- from_dir("~/my-templates") new_theme(   # data = list() enables rendering with auto-discovered variables only   from_templates("README.md", "README.md", strategy = "skip", data = list()),   # Explicit variables supplement or override auto-context   from_templates("CITATION.md", "CITATION.md",                  data = list(org_name = "Acme Corp")) ) # {{project_dir}}  Created {{date}} by {{org_name}}.

text: prefab provides opinionated theme system setting R projects. theme function returns ordered list steps deploy files, inject text, run functions. themes functions, take parameters, compose +, ship packages. Nothing touches file system apply theme use_theme() create_project().

title: Opinionated Project Scaffolding via Composable Themes
text: Themes compose +. Steps execute left--right:
code: # Project structure + agent config in one call theme <- r_targets() + claude_r_targets()  create_project("my-project", theme)

title: Opinionated Project Scaffolding via Composable Themes
text: Build themes steps using step_file(), step_text(), step_run(), source helpers like from_dir(): Source helpers resolve file paths directory (from_dir()) installed R package (from_package()). Files data = list(...) support {{var}} template interpolation via glue.
code: from_shared <- from_dir("~/shared-config")  my_theme <- new_theme(   from_shared("header.R", "R/header.R"),   step_text(c("*.csv", "*.rds"), ".gitignore", strategy = "union"),   step_run(fs::dir_create, "output", .label = "fs::dir_create") )  # Combine with built-in themes create_project("my-project", r_analysis() + my_theme)

what: prefab: Opinionated Project Scaffolding via Composable Themes — prefab-package
title: prefab: Opinionated Project Scaffolding via Composable Themes — prefab-package
text: Provides composable theme system project scaffolding. Themes ordered lists steps deploy files, inline text, execute functions, per-file merge strategies handling pre-existing content. Includes pre-set themes R analysis projects, targets workflows, Claude Code agent configuration.

title: Create a file deployment step — step_file
Create a file deployment step — step_file
text: source Absolute path source file directory. Typically produced source helper (from_package(), from_dir()) rather written hand. dest Path destination, relative project root. strategy handle pre-existing destination file. One "overwrite", "skip", "union", "append", "merge_json". data NULL (default) static file copy, named list variables interpolate file via {{var}} syntax deploying.

prefab 0.0.0.9000
text: Initial implementation composable theme system. Step constructors: step_file(), step_text(), step_run(). Source helpers: from_package(), from_dir(). Theme construction composition: new_theme(), +. Five merge strategies: "overwrite", "skip", "append", "union", "merge_json". Template rendering {{var}} syntax via glue. Public API: use_theme(), create_project(), theme_code(). Pre-set project themes: r_analysis(), r_targets(). Pre-set Claude Code agent themes: claude_r_analysis(), claude_r_targets().
